mapper.insert: INSERT INTO daily_briefings (briefing_date, content, summary, created_at) VALUES (#{briefingDate}, #{content}, #{summary}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, briefing_date, content, summary, created_at FROM daily_briefings WHERE briefing_date = #{date} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT id, briefing_date, content, summary, created_at FROM daily_briefings ORDER BY briefing_date DESC LIMIT #{limit}
